mapper.sql: id, gmt_create, gmt_modified, task_name, task_key, procinst_id, `status`, actinst_id, proc_form_key, flags, task_id, task_level, var_json
mapper.update: update t_wf_hi_ru_task set gmt_create = #{gmtCreate,jdbcType=BIGINT}, gmt_modified = #{gmtModified,jdbcType=BIGINT}, task_name = #{taskName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, task_key = #{taskKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, procinst_id = #{procinstId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, `status` = #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, actinst_id = #{actinstId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, proc_form_key = #{procFormKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, flags = #{flags,jdbcType=INTEGER}, task_id = #{taskId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, task_level = #{taskLevel,jdbcType=INTEGER}, var_json = #{varJson,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.insert:
insert into t_wf_hi_ru_task (gmt_create, gmt_modified, task_name, task_key, procinst_id, `status`, actinst_id, proc_form_key, flags, task_id, task_level, var_json) values
(#{item.gmtCreate,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.gmtModified,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.taskName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.taskKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.procinstId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.actinstId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.procFormKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.flags,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.taskId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.taskLevel,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.varJson,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR} )
mapper.select:
select
from t_wf_hi_ru_task where task_id = #{taskId,jdbcType=BIGINT} limit 1

select
from t_wf_hi_ru_task where actinst_id = #{actinstId,jdbcType=BIGINT} limit 1

select
from t_wf_hi_ru_task where procinst_id=#{procinstId,jdbcType=BIGINT} order by gmt_create asc
select task_id from t_wf_hi_ru_task where actinst_id=#{actinstId,jdbcType=BIGINT} limit 1

select task_id from t_wf_hi_ru_task where actinst_id in
#{item,jdbcType=BIGINT}
select var_json from t_wf_hi_ru_task where task_id=#{taskId,jdbcType=BIGINT} limit 1
